query: SELECT COUNT(*) as overdue FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status != 'done' AND status != 'cancelled' AND dueAt < NOW(); SELECT COUNT(*) as pending FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as overdue FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status != 'done' AND status != 'cancelled' AND dueAt < NOW(); SELECT COUNT(*) as pending FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1 AND entityType = 'deal' AND status NOT IN ('done', 'cancelled');
